creator: darrylo@hpnmhjw.sr.hp.com
text:
fdisk(8) has no provision for non-interactive, script-based use.

	This patch provides this capability.  I've also updated the man
	page.

	The priority is set to "high" because I'd like to see this
	patch, or some variant, placed into 2.2 (and the 2.2 cutoff date
	is less than a week away).  I'm working on a script that makes
	adding a disk easy, but my script needs a non-interactive fdisk.

Fix: Apply included patch.

	***** NOTE: This patch is relative to the LATEST version of fdisk
	in -current (cvs) as of November 4, 1996.

#!/bin/sh
